title: Innovative Vietnamese Bellflower Root Doraji Com Tam
description: A romantic Vietnamese dish featuring bellflower root and doraji, with a cultured cheese pull, baked to perfection in a macrobiotic friendly style, served as a Com Tam
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, toss the sliced bellflower root with 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil and season with salt.
Spread the bellflower root on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
In a separate pan, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil and saute the sliced doraji until tender.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked jasmine rice, roasted bellflower root, and sauteed doraji.
Add the cubed tofu, soy sauce, and sesame oil to the bowl and mix well.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with grated cheese.
Bake in the oven for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
